description_long: This is a tall, curved apartment building with a prominent rounded facade and a flat roof, featuring a rooftop terrace enclosed by a metal railing. The front of the building is adorned with numerous symmetrically arranged windows, decorative cornices, and a series of vertical pilasters that add depth to the facade. The uppermost floor is set back, creating a terrace area, while the lower floors are clad in a darker material, providing visual contrast. The rear of the building is more utilitarian, with a flat wall, regular window placement, and a series of balconies stacked vertically. The main entrance is centrally located at the curved front, accessible by a small set of steps. The overall color palette consists of warm beige and brown tones, with white window frames and black railings.
description: A tall, curved apartment building with a flat roof, rooftop terrace, and symmetrical window arrangement, featuring decorative facade elements and a contrasting color scheme.
description_view_0: The building's rounded front facade is visible, showcasing decorative cornices, pilasters, and a rooftop terrace with railings.
description_view_1: A direct view of the curved front, highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical window layout, and the set-back upper floor with terrace.
description_view_2: An angled view of the front and side, emphasizing the building's curvature, terrace, and detailed facade elements.
description_view_3: The rear of the building, showing a flat wall with regularly spaced windows and a vertical stack of balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns across the facade, with consistent spacing and alignment on each floor.
